author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #3 is happening this Wednesday! 

The Atlas Brew is a new Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community 

It will happen every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel 

In these events we will talk about different Star Atlas topics that the community will decide beforehand on ⁠No Access channel, as well as theorycrafting and even helping newcomers who need a little bit of guidance in the Star Atlas Metaverse ❤

This week's main topic: GUILDS   What is a guild? How can I join a guild? How can I create a guild? Multifaction or single faction guilds, Guilds and the Metaverse, Guilds and politics, Guild governance.

See you all on Wednesday at 21:30 UTC!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/945679546634604555
